html:
Foliage is a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking a Fern. Similar to Petals, Foliage can be eaten to restore 1 Health or used as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit. They can also be crafted into a Potted Fern.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Recipe
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Gallery

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Tumbleweeds may drop Petals, Dark Petals, or Foliage when harvested.

In the Hamlet DLC, Foliage can be used as a crock pot ingredient, and counts as a Vegetable.

Usage

×5

Recipe

Trivia

  • Foliage used to be green when it was implemented in the It's not a Rock! update.
    • Wilson's quote for Foliage was not changed in the update and still refers them as "Some leafy greens".
      • Wendy remarks this in DST with her quote for Ferns: "Wilson calls them 'greens'... but they're purple...".

Gallery

  • Old Foliage icon.

Foliage is a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking a Fern. Similar to Petals, Foliage can be eaten to restore 1 Health or used as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit. They can also be crafted into a Potted Fern.

Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Reign of Giants DLC, Tumbleweeds may drop Petals, Dark Petals, or Foliage when harvested.
In the Hamlet DLC, Foliage can be used as a crock pot ingredient, and counts as a Vegetable.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Foliage used to be green when it was implemented in the It's not a Rock! update.
Wilson's quote for Foliage was not changed in the update and still refers them as "Some leafy greens".
Wendy remarks this in DST with her quote for Ferns: "Wilson calls them 'greens'... but they're purple...".

'''Foliage''' is a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking a [[Fern]]. Similar to Petals, Foliage can be eaten to restore 1 Health or used as fuel in a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]]. They can also be crafted into a [[Potted Fern]].
== {{pic|32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, [[Tumbleweed]]s may drop Petals, Dark Petals, or Foliage when harvested.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Foliage can be used as a [[Crock Pot|crock pot]] ingredient, and counts as a [[Vegetable]].
== {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item = Foliage
|tool = Pig Icon
|result = Manure
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Foliage
|count1 = 5
|item2 = Broken Shell
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Potted Fern
}}

=={{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Normal Meats
|item2 = Foliage
|item3 = Vegetables
|item4 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Steamed Ham Sandwich
|dlc=Hamlet}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*Foliage used to be green when it was implemented in the ''[[Version History#It's not a rock!|It's not a Rock!]]'' update. 
**Wilson's quote for Foliage was not changed in the update and still refers them as "Some leafy greens".
***Wendy remarks this in DST with her quote for Ferns: "Wilson calls them 'greens'... but they're purple...".
